evidence.text: Repeated file encryption behavior; invoked CryptEncrypt via advapi32.dll on many user documents.
Outbound HTTPS beaconing to hard-coded IP on a non-standard port.
Accessed browser credential stores and attempted to read login data from profile directories.
Compressed collected files and posted them via HTTP multipart to an external endpoint.
Created scheduled task to execute every 30 minutes.
Used TLS libraries for normal HTTPS communication to a well-known cloud service.
Created configuration files under the application data directory.
